concerns.text: Task T029 implements 'reject Ridge' logic, but Spec FR-005 and FR-012 explicitly mandate applying Ridge regression (lambda=1.0) as the fallback before switching to univariate models. The task description contradicts the spec requirement, leaving the Ridge implementation uncovered.

Task T032 defines the sensitivity analysis p-value sweep as '{0.05, 0.1}'. Spec FR-010 and US-3 explicitly require the sweep to include the empty set (uncorrected) alongside '{0.05, 0.1}'. The task misses the uncorrected p-value test case required by the spec.

Task T015 handles motion exclusion (>3mm/3°) but does not include the task to save the calculated Mean Framewise Displacement (FD) as a mandatory covariate for the statistical model. The Plan (Methodological Clarification) and Spec (implied by confounder handling) require FD as a covariate, which is currently uncovered.

Task T034 generates the report but does not explicitly include the logic to check `metadata.study_design` for 'randomized' to determine if findings must be framed as 'ASSOCIATIONAL'. Spec FR-008 and SC-005 require this specific check and framing logic, which is missing from the task description.

Task T031 implements power analysis to flag limitations if N < 10 or halt if N < 5. However, Spec SC-004 requires the report to include the 'calculated minimum N required' based on G*Power. The task description does not explicitly cover saving/reporting this calculated minimum N value.
